subcodes.first_line: O daughter of My sister! Thy letter hath come before My presence, and the glance of favor hath been directed towards it. Praise be to the true Beloved Who through His dawning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنت اختی کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و طرف عنایت بان ناظر حمد محبوب حقیقی را که باشراق
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
